seo.title: Projects
seo.description: Projects we truly stand behind. For every project, customer satisfaction is our priority. Design, animation, and clarity are our standard.

LucieCoRadaFoti.text: A one-page website representing the work of a wedding and family photographer, focused mainly on showcasing her photos. The site allows visitors to easily book a photoshoot through a contact form. The website content can now be updated through our custom admin, which we newly offer to our clients.

DrippyRugs.text: A simple website created to introduce the brand, showcase the work, and offer the option to request a custom product. The site emphasizes maximum simplicity, clean design, and clarity.

Printujto.text: A website focused on custom 3D printing. The site includes a 3D calculator that allows users to submit an order request in a few steps with an automatically calculated price.

SolariumAvantgarda.text: Avantgarda tanning studio located in the center of Olomouc. A custom-made presentation website created specifically for the client.

Habartovi.text: The old design received a brand new look. The project included a complete rebuild and redesign of all content, including a modernized logo. The new design emphasizes clarity and creating fast pages that don’t bore visitors while browsing. Animations were added to bring the design to life. The client also requested keeping certain elements from the original site, so the new web combines a modern approach with older sections that preserve the original atmosphere.

Plenklipperen.description: Garden and snow maintenance in Bergen
Plenklipperen.text: A presentation website for Norwegian company Plenklipperen.no AS, offering professional garden care and winter maintenance services in the Bergen area. The project involved a complete redesign focused on a modern visual style and clear site structure. A significant part of the work was dedicated to SEO optimization, helping the company significantly improve its visibility in search engines on the Norwegian market.

VaktmesterBergen.description: Property management and maintenance in Bergen
VaktmesterBergen.text: Website for Norwegian company Vaktmester Bergen, providing comprehensive property management and maintenance services in the Bergen region. The project included a new design that better reflects the company’s professionalism and improves navigation for visitors. We also focused on thorough SEO optimization, helping the company reach new clients among owners of residential buildings, commercial properties, and private real estate.
